failure_signature: TDD skill generated tests but they lacked edge case coverage and assertions were incomplete — tests passed but did not verify behavior
remedy: TDD skill should enforce a checklist: test happy path, edge cases, error conditions, and boundary values. Include assertion templates for common patterns.

failure_signature: Evolver skill generated overly complex prompt instructions after multiple evolution cycles, causing agent behavior to become unpredictable
remedy: Cap evolution iterations (max 5-7). After each iteration, run a validation check: does the evolved skill still produce stable output? Stop if regression detected.

failure_signature: api-design skill generated REST endpoints but omitted error response schemas, pagination conventions, and versioning strategy
remedy: api-design skill should include a mandatory output template: endpoints, request/response schemas, error format, pagination, auth, versioning. Checklist-driven generation.
